name: Impossible Buttermilk Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease a pie plate.
3. Beat all ingredients together until smooth, for about 30 seconds in a blender on high speed or 1 minute with a hand beater.
4. Pour the mixture into the prepared pie plate.
5. Bake for about 30 minutes, or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean.
6. Allow to cool for 5 minutes before serving with fresh fruit, if desired.
